headerDisplay: Connect Roon music zones to Apple HomeKit. After saving, open **Roon → Settings → Extensions** and enable **Homebridge Roon Control**.
footerDisplay: See the [README](https://github.com/camelbl/homebridge-roon-plugin#readme) for Docker setup and troubleshooting.

roonHost.title: Roon Core IP / Hostname
roonHost.description: Fixed IP or hostname of the Roon Core. Leave empty for UDP auto-discovery. Docker: use host.docker.internal (requires extra_hosts: host.docker.internal:host-gateway in docker-compose.yml).

excludeZones.title: Exclude zones
excludeZones.description: Zone display names (exact match) that should not appear in HomeKit.

includeVolumeFan.title: Volume slider tile per zone
includeVolumeFan.description: Adds a volume slider tile per zone (Brightness = volume, On = play, Off = stop). Shows under 'Licht' in Home.

includeZoneControllers.title: Zone controller tile per zone
includeZoneControllers.description: Adds a play/stop tile per zone with the icon selected below. Shows under 'Lautsprecher & TVs' in Home. Volume accessible via iOS Control Center.

zoneDeviceType.title: Zone controller icon
zoneDeviceType.description: Icon shown in Home for zone controller tiles (only applies when zone controllers are enabled).

includeVolumeStepSwitches.title: Volume +5 / -5 step switches
includeVolumeStepSwitches.description: Adds two switch tiles per zone for volume up/down in steps of 5 %.

includeVolumeLightbulb.title: Second volume tile variant (legacy)
includeVolumeLightbulb.description: Adds a second volume slider variant. Not needed for most setups.

includeRadio.title: Internet Radio switches
includeRadio.description: Adds a switch tile per radio station per zone. Requires Roon browse access.

radioPresetCount.title: Max radio stations
radioPresetCount.description: Number of radio stations per zone (0 = all).

radioStations.title: Radio stations filter
radioStations.description: If set, only these station names are exposed (exact match). Leave empty to use max count above.

includePlaylists.title: Playlist switches
includePlaylists.description: Adds a switch tile per playlist per zone.

playlists.title: Playlists filter
playlists.description: If set, only these playlist names are exposed. Leave empty for all.

includeGenres.title: Genre switches
includeGenres.description: Adds a switch tile per genre per zone.

genrePresetCount.title: Max genres
genrePresetCount.description: Number of genres per zone (0 = all).
